markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review Engagement Manager (EM) assets, training, and KPIs.](https://fathom.video/share/wehnu_gF1tDJYqpnd25x8N9uSzc7PVXa?tab=summary&timestamp=1387.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**EM Training Gaps:** EMs lack formal assets for key tasks like QBRs and renewals, and a consistent talk track to frame GrowthX's value as a strategic partner, not just an agency.](https://fathom.video/share/wehnu_gF1tDJYqpnd25x8N9uSzc7PVXa?tab=summary&timestamp=1442.0)
  - [**Disjointed Tooling:** Account health data is scattered across Notion, making it hard to connect risk signals to actions. The team is evaluating platforms like Vitally to unify this data.](https://fathom.video/share/wehnu_gF1tDJYqpnd25x8N9uSzc7PVXa?tab=summary&timestamp=476.0)
  - [**New KPI Framework:** A "Bingo Card" gamification model will be piloted for Q1. This tracks completion of core EM tasks to gather data for defining formal, outcome-based KPIs in Q2.](https://fathom.video/share/wehnu_gF1tDJYqpnd25x8N9uSzc7PVXa?tab=summary&timestamp=2824.0)
  - [**Director Role Refined:** The Director role is evolving to focus on three areas: proactive services (e.g., SEO audits), escalated support for at-risk accounts, and team-wide training.](https://fathom.video/share/wehnu_gF1tDJYqpnd25x8N9uSzc7PVXa?tab=summary&timestamp=3546.0)

## Topics

### Problem: Disconnected Account Health Data

  - [Account health data is disjointed across Notion, making it hard to connect risk signals (Red/Yellow status) to specific actions.](https://fathom.video/share/wehnu_gF1tDJYqpnd25x8N9uSzc7PVXa?tab=summary&timestamp=476.0)
  - [This structure hinders proactive risk management and prevents the team from identifying patterns across accounts (e.g., product issues, training gaps).](https://fathom.video/share/wehnu_gF1tDJYqpnd25x8N9uSzc7PVXa?tab=summary&timestamp=710.0)
  - [**Desired Workflow:** A "golden thread" connecting risk status to:](https://fathom.video/share/wehnu_gF1tDJYqpnd25x8N9uSzc7PVXa?tab=summary&timestamp=754.0)
      - [A clear action plan.](https://fathom.video/share/wehnu_gF1tDJYqpnd25x8N9uSzc7PVXa?tab=summary&timestamp=754.0)
      - [A request for help (if needed).](https://fathom.video/share/wehnu_gF1tDJYqpnd25x8N9uSzc7PVXa?tab=summary&timestamp=754.0)
      - [A closeout/follow-up to drive accountability.](https://fathom.video/share/wehnu_gF1tDJYqpnd25x8N9uSzc7PVXa?tab=summary&timestamp=754.0)
  - [**Tooling Evaluation:** The team is evaluating platforms (Vitally, Monday, Pylon) to unify this data. Vitally is a strong candidate, as it can also integrate Fathom call recordings for deeper analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/wehnu_gF1tDJYqpnd25x8N9uSzc7PVXa?tab=summary&timestamp=567.0)

### Solution: Structured EM Training & Assets

  - [**Goal:** Standardize EM workflows to ensure consistent, high-quality customer experience and elevate the team's strategic value.](https://fathom.video/share/wehnu_gF1tDJYqpnd25x8N9uSzc7PVXa?tab=summary&timestamp=1633.0)
  - [**Identified Training Gaps:**](https://fathom.video/share/wehnu_gF1tDJYqpnd25x8N9uSzc7PVXa?tab=summary&timestamp=1442.0)
      - [**QBRs & Renewals:** No formal templates or agendas exist for these critical conversations.](https://fathom.video/share/wehnu_gF1tDJYqpnd25x8N9uSzc7PVXa?tab=summary&timestamp=1442.0)
      - [**GrowthX Positioning:** EMs need a consistent talk track to frame GrowthX's value as a strategic partner, not just an editorial agency.](https://fathom.video/share/wehnu_gF1tDJYqpnd25x8N9uSzc7PVXa?tab=summary&timestamp=1773.0)
      - [**Product Demos:** EMs need training to demo the Atlas platform, a key differentiator that showcases the complexity and value of GrowthX's AI-driven systems.](https://fathom.video/share/wehnu_gF1tDJYqpnd25x8N9uSzc7PVXa?tab=summary&timestamp=1893.0)
      - [**AI Industry Expertise:** The team must become AI experts. This requires a formal program (e.g., internal newsletter, lunch-and-learns) to curate and deliver industry trends to EMs.](https://fathom.video/share/wehnu_gF1tDJYqpnd25x8N9uSzc7PVXa?tab=summary&timestamp=2228.0)
  - [**Training Program Ownership:** Andi has started a Notion board to map the customer journey and identify asset gaps. This will be shared with Marisol and George to ensure a collaborative and comprehensive training program.](https://fathom.video/share/wehnu_gF1tDJYqpnd25x8N9uSzc7PVXa?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)

### Solution: New KPI Framework for EMs

  - [**Current State:** The primary KPI is "don't churn." Formal CSAT surveys were ineffective, and health scores are not yet calibrated enough to be a reliable KPI.](https://fathom.video/share/wehnu_gF1tDJYqpnd25x8N9uSzc7PVXa?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [**Q1 "Bingo Card" Pilot:** A gamified model will be used to track completion of core EM tasks (e.g., running a QBR, discussing AI trends).](https://fathom.video/share/wehnu_gF1tDJYqpnd25x8N9uSzc7PVXa?tab=summary&timestamp=2824.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This pilot ensures EMs perform all key functions, providing the data needed to define formal, outcome-based KPIs for Q2.](https://fathom.video/share/wehnu_gF1tDJYqpnd25x8N9uSzc7PVXa?tab=summary&timestamp=2824.0)
      - [**Incentive Ideas:** Non-monetary rewards like "dancing bananas" or a "Marcel cameo" were suggested to keep the pilot lighthearted and fun.](https://fathom.video/share/wehnu_gF1tDJYqpnd25x8N9uSzc7PVXa?tab=summary&timestamp=3174.0)

### Director Role Refinement

  - [The Director role is being refined to focus on three distinct areas, providing a clear framework for their contribution:](https://fathom.video/share/wehnu_gF1tDJYqpnd25x8N9uSzc7PVXa?tab=summary&timestamp=3546.0)
    1.  [**Proactive Services:** Delivering specific, billable services like SEO audits.](https://fathom.video/share/wehnu_gF1tDJYqpnd25x8N9uSzc7PVXa?tab=summary&timestamp=3546.0)
    2.  [**Escalated Support:** Stepping in to support at-risk accounts with critical strategic needs.](https://fathom.video/share/wehnu_gF1tDJYqpnd25x8N9uSzc7PVXa?tab=summary&timestamp=3546.0)
    3.  [**Training & Enablement:** Leading team-wide training to build expertise (e.g., data analysis, AI trends).](https://fathom.video/share/wehnu_gF1tDJYqpnd25x8N9uSzc7PVXa?tab=summary&timestamp=3546.0)

      - [Share the Notion training board with Marisol and George.](https://fathom.video/share/wehnu_gF1tDJYqpnd25x8N9uSzc7PVXa?tab=summary&timestamp=2408.0)

      - [Slack the EM training needs list to Marisol, George, and Bridget.](https://fathom.video/share/wehnu_gF1tDJYqpnd25x8N9uSzc7PVXa?tab=summary&timestamp=2408.0)

      - [Develop the "Bingo Card" pilot program for Q1.](https://fathom.video/share/wehnu_gF1tDJYqpnd25x8N9uSzc7PVXa?tab=summary&timestamp=3100.0)
